data.title: Eco Wave Power Highlights March Wave Power Gains at Jaffa Port as AI Energy Demand Rises
data.description:
Easter Sale - 70% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Eco Wave Power Global ( (WAVE) ) has provided an update.

Eco Wave Power Global AB, a Nasdaq-traded leader in onshore wave energy, develops patented systems that generate renewable electricity from waves using floaters mounted on existing coastal structures. The company focuses on supplying clean power close to coastal population centers and infrastructure, including ports, industrial facilities and data centers that face rising electricity demand.

On April 7, 2026, Eco Wave Power reported March 2026 production results from its EWP-EDF One pilot project at Jaffa Port, Israel, where continuous operation and roughly six days of 1–2 meter waves produced over 1,200 kWh of electricity. The system has recorded zero downtime in wave heights of 1 meter and above since early 2025, reinforcing the durability and scalability of its onshore technology and underscoring its potential to power coastal AI and data-center infrastructure amid growing attention, including a mention in NVIDIA CEO Jensen Huang’s GTC keynote.

The most recent analyst rating on (WAVE) stock is a Hold with a $6.50 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Eco Wave Power Global stock, see the WAVE Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on WAVE Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, WAVE is a Neutral.

The score is held down primarily by weak financial performance (unstable, shrinking revenue; ongoing losses; and worsening free cash flow burn). Technical indicators provide some near-term support with improving short-term momentum, but valuation is constrained by negative earnings and no dividend.

To see Spark’s full report on WAVE stock, click here.

More about Eco Wave Power Global

Eco Wave Power Global AB is a Nasdaq-listed renewable energy company specializing in onshore wave energy technology that converts ocean and sea waves into clean, reliable and cost-efficient electricity. By installing patented floaters on existing coastal infrastructure such as breakwaters, jetties and piers, it targets power delivery near coastal cities, ports, data centers and other energy-intensive shoreline facilities.

The company operates Israel’s first grid-connected wave energy power station at Jaffa Port, recognized as a pioneering technology by the Israeli Ministry of Energy and co-funded by EDF Power Solutions, and has launched a pilot station at the Port of Los Angeles with Shell Marine Renewable Energy. It is expanding a 404.7 MW global project pipeline in markets including Portugal, Taiwan and India, backed by support from European and international climate and innovation programs.

Technical Sentiment Signal: Hold

data.title: Azenta Reshapes Multiomics Leadership and Executive Compensation
data.description:
Easter Sale - 70% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

The latest announcement is out from Azenta ( (AZTA) ).

On April 6, 2026, Azenta implemented a leadership change in its Multiomics business, with Ginger Zhou stepping down as president and continuing as an adviser through November 2026 under a consulting agreement, while William “Trey” E. Martin III was appointed as her successor. The move is intended to support continuity as the segment advances into its next phase of execution, with Zhou’s departure not linked to any dispute over company operations or policies.

Martin, a veteran executive with prior leadership roles at Maravai LifeSciences and Danaher’s genomic medicine and Integrated DNA Technologies units, will lead the Multiomics unit and report to CEO John Marotta under an offer package featuring a $540,000 base salary, incentive-based cash compensation and substantial equity awards. His appointment is explicitly tied to accelerating Azenta’s long-range Multiomics plan, emphasizing global gene synthesis scale-up, operational excellence, commercial discipline and profitable growth across the platform.

Alongside the leadership transition, Azenta adjusted its executive compensation structures by approving severance and change-in-control amendments for senior leaders Lawrence Lin, Ephraim Starr and Olga Pirogova, including enhanced lump-sum payouts, pro-rated bonuses and extended health benefits in certain termination scenarios. These changes, recommended by the board’s compensation committee, are designed to reinforce management stability and retention as Azenta pursues its multi-year Multiomics and gene synthesis growth strategy.

The most recent analyst rating on (AZTA) stock is a Buy with a $35.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Azenta stock, see the AZTA Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on AZTA Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, AZTA is a Neutral.

AZTA scores below average primarily due to weak technical trend signals (price well below key moving averages and negative MACD) and ongoing profitability concerns despite improving revenue. The strong balance sheet and currently positive free cash flow support resilience, while the earnings call provides a constructive longer-term framework (reaffirmed FY2026 targets and buyback) that is tempered by near-term margin compression and execution risk. Corporate actions are directionally supportive but include added uncertainty from the divestiture delay.

To see Spark’s full report on AZTA stock, click here.

More about Azenta

Azenta, Inc., headquartered in Burlington, Mass., is a global life sciences solutions provider focused on enabling faster development of therapeutics and scientific breakthroughs. The company offers cold-chain sample management and multiomics services, including genomics and gene synthesis, serving pharmaceutical, biotech, academic and healthcare customers worldwide through brands such as GENEWIZ and FluidX.

Azenta operates across North America, Europe and Asia, supporting drug development, clinical research and advanced cell therapies. Its integrated platform is aimed at scaling global synthesis capabilities and multiomics services to deepen adoption among leading industry and research institutions.

data.title: Evaxion Completes One-Year Extension of Phase 2 Trial for AI-Designed Melanoma Vaccine EVX-01
data.description:
Easter Sale - 70% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions

Evaxion Biotech ( (EVAX) ) has issued an announcement.

On April 7, 2026, Evaxion announced it has completed the one-year extension of its phase 2 trial of EVX-01, a personalized cancer vaccine for advanced melanoma, with the last patient having had their final physician visit. The study design allows evaluation of EVX-01 both in combination with Keytruda and as a monotherapy, potentially strengthening Evaxion’s position in AI-designed cancer vaccines as it prepares three-year data for release in the second half of 2026.

The trial has already produced encouraging one- and two-year results, including a 75% Objective Response Rate, with 12 of 16 patients responding and four achieving complete responses. Durable benefit was observed, with 92% of patients still responding at two years, no relapses reported, high tumor reduction rates, and strong neoantigen-specific T-cell responses, underscoring both the tolerability of EVX-01 and the precision of Evaxion’s AI-Immunology platform.

Evaxion A/S is a Denmark-based clinical-stage TechBio company that uses its proprietary, clinically validated AI-Immunology platform to design novel vaccines for cancer and infectious diseases. The company’s pipeline includes both personalized and off-the-shelf cancer vaccines, as well as prophylactic candidates, targeting high unmet medical needs in oncology and infectious disease markets.

data.description:

Revival Gold ( (TSE:RVG) ) has provided an update.

Revival Gold reported final 2025 drilling results from its Mercur Gold Project in Utah, highlighted by a high-grade intercept of 2.8 grams per tonne gold over 74 meters, including 8.0 grams per tonne over 12 meters at South Mercur. Additional broad zones of near-surface mineralization and mineralized historical waste rock, not currently in resources, underscore the robustness of the Mercur system and suggest potential to expand resources both within and below existing pit designs.

The company plans to restart a 16,000-meter exploration and engineering drilling program at Mercur later this month, with data from the 2025–2026 campaigns feeding into a planned pre-feasibility study targeted for early 2027. Combined with ongoing drilling at its Beartrack-Arnett project in Idaho, these results position Revival Gold for a potentially significant step toward restarting gold production at Mercur and enhancing its profile in the North American gold development space.

data.title: Abitibi Metals Extends High-Grade Zone at B26 With Step-Out Drilling
data.description:
Easter Sale - 70% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

An update from Abitibi Metals ( (TSE:AMQ) ) is now available.

Abitibi Metals reported strong step-out drilling results at its B26 polymetallic deposit in Québec, highlighted by a key hole intersecting 1.81% copper equivalent over 15 metres, including 2.71% copper equivalent over 7 metres in the western down-plunge zone. These intercepts extend the high-grade Copper Stringer zone by about 300 metres beyond the current block model and confirm that mineralization remains open to the west, reinforcing B26 as a priority growth area for the company.

Additional step-out holes up to 350 metres from existing drilling encountered broad alteration halos and localized higher-grade copper equivalent values, indicating robust geological continuity and substantial exploration upside despite some grade variability. With more than 8,200 metres drilled so far this year, a third rig being added, and 40,000 metres of planned drilling for 2026, Abitibi is positioning B26 for meaningful resource expansion and quality upgrades that could enhance the project’s long-term value for stakeholders.

The most recent analyst rating on (TSE:AMQ) stock is a Sell with a C$0.57 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Abitibi Metals stock, see the TSE:AMQ Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on AMQ Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, AMQ is a Neutral.

The score is primarily held back by weak operating performance (no revenue, widening losses, and ongoing cash burn). A debt-free balance sheet and expanded equity/assets provide meaningful financial stability, but technical signals are soft (below short-term averages with weak momentum) and valuation support is limited due to a negative P/E and no dividend.

To see Spark’s full report on AMQ stock, click here.

More about Abitibi Metals

Abitibi Metals Corp. is a Canadian exploration company focused on advancing the B26 polymetallic deposit in Québec, primarily targeting copper-gold mineralization. The company operates the project through a joint venture with SOQUEM Inc., holding an 80% interest, and is pursuing aggressive drilling to grow resources and upgrade the deposit’s classification.

data.description:

An announcement from TransThera Sciences (Nanjing). Inc. ( (HK:2617) ) is now available.

TransThera Sciences (Nanjing), Inc. plans to adopt an H Share Award Scheme, enabling the grant of share-based awards funded through treasury shares, newly issued H shares, or existing H shares to eligible participants including employees, related entities and service providers. The initiative, which requires shareholder approval at an upcoming extraordinary general meeting and listing approval for any new shares, is designed to formalize equity incentives and may strengthen the company’s talent retention and alignment of stakeholder interests, while signaling a more mature capital management approach in line with Hong Kong listing rules.

The board is also seeking authorization for a designated Scheme Administrator to handle all operational and documentation matters related to implementing the H Share Award Scheme, streamlining administration once the plan is approved. The company will issue a circular with further details and has urged shareholders and potential investors to exercise caution when trading its securities until the scheme’s adoption and related approvals are confirmed.

More about TransThera Sciences (Nanjing). Inc.

TransThera Sciences (Nanjing), Inc. is a joint stock company incorporated in the People’s Republic of China with limited liability, whose H shares are listed on the Hong Kong Stock Exchange under stock code 2617. The company operates in the biopharmaceutical sector, focusing on developing and commercializing innovative therapies and targeting global capital markets through its Hong Kong listing.

data.title: Boxlight Amends Financing Deal, Converts Debt to Equity
data.description:
Easter Sale - 70% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Boxlight ( (BOXL) ) has provided an announcement.

On April 1, 2026, Boxlight Corporation amended an existing inventory finance agreement with Utah-based J.J. Astor & Co., converting $556,200 of outstanding debt into 600,000 shares of common stock at a price of $0.927 per share. Under the amended terms, Boxlight agreed to a proceeds protection provision, committing to pay J.J. Astor in cash any shortfall if the sale of the conversion shares generates less than $556,200.

The transaction effectively reduces Boxlight’s debt while potentially diluting existing shareholders, and ties the final economic outcome to market demand for its stock. The deal also highlights a significant related-party dimension, as J.J. Astor is led by Boxlight’s chairman and former CEO Michael Pope and is beneficially owned by a private investment fund he manages, underscoring governance and conflict-of-interest considerations for investors.

The most recent analyst rating on (BOXL) stock is a Sell with a $1.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Boxlight stock, see the BOXL Stock Forecast page.

NFI Group Inc ( (TSE:NFI) ) just unveiled an announcement.

San Diego’s Metropolitan Transit System has extended its long-standing relationship with NFI subsidiary New Flyer by exercising an option for 73 additional compressed natural gas Xcelsior buses. The roughly $64 million order, placed under a five-year contract, will refresh MTS’s fleet with more efficient, low-emission vehicles while supporting U.S. manufacturing jobs and domestic supply chains.

The buses, comprising 50 forty-foot and 23 sixty-foot models, will replace aging units and help MTS maintain safe, reliable service across nearly 100 bus routes for millions of riders in San Diego County. By modernizing its fleet with New Flyer’s CNG technology, MTS aims to enhance service quality and connectivity for residents and visitors, reinforcing NFI’s position as a key supplier in North American transit.

data.title: Prismo Metals’ Silver King Drilling Confirms High-Grade Silver and Points to Porphyry Copper Potential
data.description:
Easter Sale - 70% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Prismo Metals Inc. ( (TSE:PRIZ) ) just unveiled an announcement.

Prismo Metals has completed its Phase I diamond drilling program at the historic Silver King project in Arizona, executing eight holes totaling 1,272 metres to test the upper levels of a pipe-like mineralized body and a deeper down-plunge target. All holes intersected the targeted quartz-vein and stockwork system, validating historical mine data and the company’s 3D geological model, and indicating that previous mining may have been less extensive than earlier reports suggested.

The drilling confirmed extensive epithermal quartz-baryte veins with visible silver-bearing sulfides in the upper portions of the system, supporting the potential for remaining high-grade silver resources in the near-mine environment. A deep hole, SK-26-07, cut potassic alteration with disseminated pyrite and local chalcopyrite and pyrrhotite in a previously unrecognized intrusion, pointing to possible porphyry copper mineralization at depth and materially expanding the exploration upside of the Silver King property.

Management highlighted vertical metal zoning from shallow silver-rich zones toward deeper copper-bearing alteration, drawing parallels to the historic Magma mine and emphasizing Silver King’s location just 3.4 km from the giant Resolution deposit. With exploration still open at depth and several undrilled targets, the Phase I results strengthen Prismo’s geological model and suggest the project could evolve from a historic silver camp into a larger-scale silver-copper system, a development that could enhance the company’s long-term strategic positioning in a Tier 1 copper district.

The most recent analyst rating on (TSE:PRIZ) stock is a Sell with a C$0.11 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Prismo Metals Inc. stock, see the TSE:PRIZ Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on PRIZ Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, PRIZ is a Neutral.

The score is primarily constrained by weak financial performance (no revenue, ongoing losses, and funding dependence) despite a low-debt balance sheet and some improvement in cash burn. Technical indicators are mixed-to-neutral, and valuation is difficult to justify due to negative earnings and no dividend support.

To see Spark’s full report on PRIZ stock, click here.

More about Prismo Metals Inc.

Prismo Metals Inc. is a Canadian mineral exploration company focused on precious and base metals, with current activity centered on the historic Silver King project in the Pioneer Mining District near Superior, Arizona. The company targets high-grade silver and potentially porphyry-style copper mineralization in proximity to major regional assets, including the nearby Resolution Copper deposit operated by Rio Tinto and BHP.

Average Trading Volume: 269,035

Technical Sentiment Signal: Strong Sell

Current Market Cap: C$9.03M
